hero.title: Industries We Transform
hero.description: We don't just build software; we build industry-specific competitive advantages. From highly regulated healthcare systems to high-frequency fintech platforms.

industries.name: FinTech & Banking
industries.desc: Secure, scalable, and compliant financial systems. We build core banking engines, payment gateways, and AI-driven fraud detection.

industries.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences
industries.desc: Empowering providers with HIPAA-compliant patient portals, EHR integrations, and AI diagnostic assistants.

industries.name: E-Commerce & Retail
industries.desc: High-performance storefronts and headless commerce architectures that drive massive conversion and scale.

industries.name: Logistics & Supply Chain
industries.desc: Optimizing global trade with real-time tracking, warehouse automation, and predictive route optimization.

industries.name: EdTech & Learning
industries.desc: Interactive LMS platforms, virtual classrooms, and AI tutors that personalize the learning journey.

industries.name: Real Estate & PropTech
industries.desc: Modernizing property management, virtual tours, and automated valuation models for the modern market.

industries.name: Media & Entertainment
industries.desc: Transforming how audiences consume content with scalable streaming platforms, personalized recommendation engines, and high-engagement digital experiences.

industries.name: Travel & Tourism
industries.desc: Elevating the modern travel experience through AI-driven itineraries, seamless booking integrations, and dynamic pricing engines.

industries.name: Manufacturing & Industrial
industries.desc: IoT data aggregation, production line tracking, and enterprise-wide ERP synchronization for factories where downtime is measured in lakhs per hour.

industries.name: Food & Restaurant
industries.desc: Order management, POS integrations, and delivery workflow automation for restaurants and food businesses.

benefits.title: Compliance-First
benefits.description: Every system built to meet industry-specific regulations — PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GDPR, and more.

benefits.title: High Performance
benefits.description: Architectures built for real-time processing, high concurrency, and sub-second response times.

benefits.title: Deep Integrations
benefits.description: Seamless connectivity with industry-standard APIs, ERPs, payment gateways, and legacy systems.

benefits.title: AI-Augmented
benefits.description: Machine learning models trained on industry data — fraud detection, diagnostics, personalization.

benefits.title: Scalable by Design
benefits.description: Cloud-native architectures that scale from 100 to 100,000 concurrent users without re-architecture.

benefits.title: Security Hardened
benefits.description: End-to-end encryption, SOC2 practices, penetration-tested deployments across all systems.

items.q: Do you have experience in my specific industry?
items.a: We've delivered projects across 10+ verticals including FinTech, Healthcare, E-Commerce, Logistics, EdTech, and Real Estate. Our team includes domain experts who understand industry-specific compliance and technical requirements.

items.q: How do you handle industry compliance (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, etc.)?
items.a: Compliance is baked into our development process from day one — not bolted on at the end. We conduct compliance audits at every sprint review and maintain documentation for regulatory bodies.

items.q: Can you integrate with our existing legacy systems?
items.a: Absolutely. We specialize in building modern interfaces that communicate with legacy backends via APIs, middleware, and event-driven architectures — no rip-and-replace required.

cta.title: Have an industry-specific challenge?
cta.description: Our team of domain experts is ready to engineer your solution.
